plugins.name: 3d-websites
plugins.description: Build interactive 3D web experiences — landing pages, product showcases, and portfolio sites powered by Three.js and AI-generated 3D models.

plugins.name: product-studio
plugins.description: Virtual product photography and prototyping — generate photorealistic 3D mockups, explore colorways, and render turntable shots without a physical studio.

plugins.name: game-assets
plugins.description: Game-ready 3D content pipeline — batch-generate props, characters, and environment pieces with automatic LOD levels and optimized topology.

plugins.name: interior-design
plugins.description: 3D interior design — generate furniture, decor, and fixtures, then compose them into room visualizations for architects and designers.

plugins.name: robot-simulation-environment
plugins.description: Generate 3D environments for robotic simulation — create workspace props, export to Blender/OpenUSD, and prepare scenes for Isaac Lab.
